title: =THIS IS PATRICK= Sparta Pioneer Remix
description:
Enjoy this masterpiece:

Remix:   http://www.mediafire.com/?p4s5htyj1cho2nf
Base:     http://www.mediafire.com/?434r6z1wu1s7nmz

1 Year later of my last Sparta remix, i bring you this.
This is how a true sparta remix should be done.
The time passes, but if once i was recognised as the king of sparta remixes,
i've seen all my legacy, thanks for everyone that have seen me as a source of inspiration to do some YTPMV and fads, i feel great to make everyone happy.

[AND BY THE WAY, THIS IS NOT A SUICIDE/GOODBYE/EMO/GAY NOTE, jackasses]

Have fun, and enjoy the base. (USED Magix Music Maker 14 & Mixcraft 5)
